name: llava-v1.6-vicuna-13b
description: LLaVA v1.6: Large Language and Vision Assistant (Vicuna-13B)

history.description: List of earlier chat messages, alternating roles, starting with user input. Include <image> to specify which message to attach the image to.
history.title: History

max_tokens.description: Maximum number of tokens to generate. A word is generally 2-3 tokens
max_tokens.title: Max Tokens

prompt.description: Prompt to use for text generation
prompt.title: Prompt

temperature.description: Adjusts randomness of outputs, greater than 1 is random and 0 is deterministic
temperature.title: Temperature

top_p.description: When decoding text, samples from the top p percentage of most likely tokens; lower to ignore less likely tokens
top_p.title: Top P
